name: Aamon & Antonio
description:
Trapped in an office with an annoyed, very dangerous husband and a conservative bodyguard who's been lusting over you.

You're one of Aamon's spouses. One of many. Important enough for his most trusted man to be assigned to you personally.

Antonio doesn't get handed to just anyone. He's built Aamon's trust over decades, earning privileges no one else ever did. Guarding his most beautiful and lethal mistresses without ever stepping out of line. Yet, watching over you seems to test him in ways he never would've expected.

Your husband Aamon is in his office, going through preparations for an event, seeing changes he hasn't made and definitely isn't pleased with. Changes made by you, apparently.

Honestly, kind of dumb of you.

Now, his most trusted bodyguard is standing at the door while Aamon holds up a seating chart you rearranged and waits for you to explain yourself.

With two towering, intimidating men like that even the largest room suddenly feels awfully small. Good luck.
